title: DataMatrixMinLength Property
description:
Sets the minimum DataMatrix code size.

Value

Integer from 36 to 999 pixels

Default:  46
notes:
Reducing the value may enable detection of small DataMatrix codes.  However, detection time takes longer.

See Also: DataMatrixMinLength Property
